tex:
(a) Work out the inverse of the matrix $\begin{pmatrix} -3 & 10 \\ 1 & -5 \end{pmatrix}$.
\newline

(b) Work out the value of $x$ and the value of $y$ in this matrix calculation.
\newline

$\begin{pmatrix} 1 \\ 2 \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} 5 & -4 \\ y & 2 \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} x \\ 1 \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} 9 \\ 46 \end{pmatrix}$

content.content:
Work out the inverse of the matrix $\begin{pmatrix} -3 & 10 \\ 1 & -5 \end{pmatrix}$.
\newline

Work out the value of $x$ and the value of $y$ in this matrix calculation.
\newline

$\begin{pmatrix} 1 \\ 2 \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} 5 & -4 \\ y & 2 \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} x \\ 1 \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} 9 \\ 46 \end{pmatrix}$
